name: POST /api/agents/synthetic_lethality
what_it_solves: Direct SL engine endpoint — returns tier-assigned axis results for a PatientState.
how_it_solves: Live commit + response body captured in sl_endpoint_mbd4_live.json. Top-level keys observed in this response: ['patient_id', 'disease', 'gating', 'evidence_matrix', 'synthetic_lethality_detected', 'double_hit_description', 'essentiality_scores', 'broken_pathways', 'essential_pathways', 'recommended_drugs', 'suggested_therapy', 'explanation', 'calculation_time_ms', 'evo2_used', 'provenance']
why_it_exists: Exposes the engine as a peer-callable service (used by the Ayesha bundle and by direct API consumers).
